name: Auto-run Tests on Session End
description: Automatically runs appropriate tests at session end based on which file categories were modified (routes, prompts, or tools).

actions.label: Test Summary Context
actions.content:
Based on the files modified in this session, the following tests will be run at the end:
- If src/routes/ files were modified: npm run test:integration
- If src/assistant/prompts/ files were modified: npm run pf:eval
- If src/tools/ files were modified: npm test

All tests will run to ensure changes work correctly.
